productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Chatterbox Pink Top
description: Style NoteIf your little angel's mantra in life is to talk, talk, talk, and talk some more, this pink t-shirt from little miss is perfect for her! Specially made for all the adorable little chatterboxes, this tee is all she needs to tell the world that a little talkative magpie is in their midst! Team it with jeans, shorts or caprisProduct DetailsPink t-shirt that has a round neck, has cap sleeves with gathers, graphic print and sequins on the front and a short buttoned placket at the backMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
